title: Build and Test an MCP Server with Official SDKs
description: Implement a typed server with tools, resources, and automated protocol tests. Learners cumulatively produce a runnable tested MCP server through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Select an official maintained SDK and pin a compatible protocol target.
Create server metadata, capabilities, handlers, and transport entry points.
Validate structured inputs and return typed content or structured errors.
